{"code":"(def filtered-prs (filter (fn [pr] (contains? (:closes_linear pr) "ENG-")) (github__list_pull_requests {:state "merged"})))
(def issue-ids (map :closes_linear filtered-prs))
(def issues (linear__list_issues {:state "done"}))
(def done-ids (set (map :id issues))
(def not-done-prs (filter (fn [pr] (not (contains? done-ids (:closes_linear pr)))) filtered-prs))
